description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, these flats work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge.Product DetailsBrown thong style straps with rivet details all over and an elasticated strap across the midfootSoft footbed with a yellow heel patchUpper stitched to the outsoleTPU outsole with herringbone grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
